name: opencoreemr/oce-module-onc-registration-tools-openemr
description: OpenEMR source tree for static analysis (PHPStan) and the local Docker bind mount. Pinned to PUBLIC upstream openemr/openemr rel-810 so analysis resolves the Symfony-Session API the module targets (rel-810's CsrfUtils is byte-identical to the internal oce-810 core, and every OpenEMR symbol this module uses exists on rel-810). Not a runtime dependency of the module — see tools/openemr/README.md. Public upstream needs no credential, so CI requires no GitHub App token.
